title: Minecraft: Askew | Arachnophobia Add-On
description: I'm having trouble with this whole....spider....area.......!
body:
BEFORE YOU DO ANYTHING!!!
-Install Optifine 1.20.1 !!!!!
-Turn off Mipmaps!! (Video Settings/Quality/Mipmap Levels: Off)

After these two teensy tiny tweaks Askew should work like a dream!!

I have received many a tale!! A tale of unpleasantness!! To some, the 'Triders" in Minecraft: Askew are far too frightening to those afflicted by Arachnophobia!

Grand News!!Phobe no mo'......be.....

This handy Add-On just replaces everything involving spiders with some less scary stuff! 
-Spider Models
-Spider Textures
-Spider Items-
Spider Sounds

Unless you have a fear of Add-Ons...Which I currently do not have a workaround for...................

[CHECK OUT THE FULL PACK HERE!!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/minecraft-askew)

This pack has nothing to do with the music but im shilling it anyways and if you're mean to me im gonna show you a picture of a spider to combat you :)!!

[Minecraft: Askew | FULL ALBUM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uS_QptSd_C0)

PLEASE!! I don’t want to sound like a beggar! But I worked so hard on this pack, and it would mean the world if you could spare a couple bucks,thanks boss :)!

[Support Minecraft: Askew on Ko-Fi :)!!](https://ko-fi.com/pikes)

Album available on:
Spotify
Apple Music
Soundcloud
Bandcamp
And pretty much everywhere else you get music!:)!!
